papers_mined.title: Mosuo (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Matrilineal ethnic group in Yunnan/Sichuan China; walking marriage zou hun / sese; no contract or obligations; multiple sexual relationships permitted; men live in mother's home + visit partner evenings only.

papers_mined.title: Mosuo Adaptive Benefits Origins Matriliny (Culture and Evolution 2022)
papers_mined.note: Mosuo dual-house family structure: men in mother's Awo + visits partner's Awo at night; corporate house group ~20 people.

papers_mined.title: China Last Matrilineal Society Mosuo (World of Chinese)
papers_mined.note: No commitment / no resource exchange courtship; children reared by mother's brothers + matrilineal Awo.

papers_mined.title: Walking Marriage Mosuo (China Daily)
papers_mined.note: Dual-house structure: each Mosuo retains residence in mother's house regardless of partner status.

papers_mined.title: LLM Black-Box Dynamics Attractor-Based Persona Continuity (Medium 2026/03)
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: input text creates semantic basin; inference collapses into same attractor; persona continuity = repeated reconstruction into same attractor.
